ValidationRule.description: Blocks edits to Warranty records that are not Active, except for System Administrators and except for transitioning the Status off Active. Allows creation of new records regardless of status.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), NOT($Profile.Name = "System Administrator"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Active") = FALSE, OR( ISCHANGED(Start_Date__c), ISCHANGED(Warranty_Term_Months__c), ISCHANGED(Product__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only active warranties can be edited. This warranty is not active and its details cannot be changed.
